input.headline: Doing these fall garden chores will make your spring easier

raw.headline: Doing these fall garden chores will make your spring easier

winner: Plant bulbs now and they’ll sprout their own lawn chairs for spring—no ladders required!

candidates.text: I’ll plant my garden now so I don’t have to think about it during the winter—it’s like doing homework *before* the exam!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Relatable analogy with a clever twist on timing and procrastination"}

candidates.text: Raking leaves is a vital step—if you don’t, come spring, your yard will look like a toddler’s glitter bomb exploded.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising and specific comparison with vivid imagery, concise and funny"}

candidates.text: Plant bulbs now and they’ll sprout their own lawn chairs for spring—no ladders required!

candidates.text: Why did the rake get promoted? It always went above and beyond, pulling weeds from the top of the heap!
Why did the tomato get promoted? Because it knew how to rake up some autumn leaves!
